data.body: F-REGISTER cleanup + prereq/follow-on epics (Joe's directives). Created 5 epics: code-grounding tooling PREREQ 8f6c (5fd2+9da1 depend_on it; DET-floor child 012e depends_on it); F5 config tool 55de; F6 bug-review gate 3e50; F8 project-criteria+invariants 3156; F9 code-drift invalidation 4fcd (all relates_to 5fd2; pass gates). REMOVED the F1-F12 prose list from 5fd2; replaced with explicit Scope carve-outs: F1-F4+F11+F12 = hypothetical future tuning, OUT OF SCOPE + NOT tracked; F5/F6/F8/F9 = the new linked epics; F10 = handled by the eval suite; F7 = largely existing (G4 within-epic + next_batch + dup/supersedes links), only store-wide SEMANTIC overlap uncovered, disposition deferred. 5fd2 still passes gates.
